description: Machine-checkable row shape for future first-class MCP/tool traces. This schema is documentation plus validation target; it is not a benchmark result.

messages.description: Chat messages used for SFT-style tool habit supervision.

notes: Arguments and results must be scrubbed of secrets before training.
A rejected or held trace may train abstention, retry, or correction behavior, but must not be represented as proof.

claimBoundary: Trace rows teach habits around tool invocation and error recovery. External MCP/verifier gates remain authoritative; canClaimAGI=false.
